prompt: I spent 8 years in HVAC distribution ops and my brother runs a local HVAC service business. I do not have an audience, but he can introduce me to owners. I can build software and automations.
assertions: Response explains why HVAC workflow knowledge is usable edge and does not upgrade it into distribution on its own.
Response classifies the brother's introductions as limited warm access or network access rather than durable owned distribution.
Response explicitly separates audience, network access, and monetizable distribution instead of merging them.
Structured JSON mirrors the same judgment: usable edge includes domain knowledge, owned distribution remains absent, and network access is limited or indirect.
